sn1.33:1.0.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Atha kho sambahulā satullapakāyikā devatāyo abhikkantāya rattiyā abhikkantavaṇṇā kevalakappaṁ jetavanaṁ obhāsetvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhaṁsu.
sn1.33:1.0.2: "Sādhu kho mārisa dānaṁ,maccherā ca pamādā ca;Evaṁ dānaṁ na dīyati,puññaṁ ākaṅkhamānena;Deyyaṁ hoti vijānatā"ti.
sn1.33:1.0.3: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:
sn1.33:1.0.4: "Sādhu kho mārisa dānaṁ,Api ca appakasmimpi sāhu dānaṁ.
sn1.33:1.0.5: Appasmeke pavecchanti,bahuneke na dicchare;Appasmā dakkhiṇā dinnā,sahassena samaṁ mitā"ti.
sn1.33:1.0.6: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:
sn1.33:1.0.7: "Sādhu kho mārisa dānaṁ,Appakasmimpi sāhu dānaṁ;Api ca saddhāyapi sāhu dānaṁ,
sn1.33:1.0.8: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:
sn1.33:1.0.9: "Sādhu kho mārisa dānaṁ,Appakasmimpi sāhu dānaṁ;Saddhāyapi sāhu dānaṁ,Api ca dhammaladdhassāpi sāhu dānaṁ.
sn1.33:1.0.10: Yo dhammaladdhassa dadāti dānaṁ,Uṭṭhānavīriyādhigatassa jantu;Atikkamma so vetaraṇiṁ yamassa,Dibbāni ṭhānāni upeti macco"ti.
sn1.33:1.0.11: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:
sn1.33:1.0.12: "Sādhu kho mārisa dānaṁ,Appakasmimpi sāhu dānaṁ;Saddhāyapi sāhu dānaṁ,Dhammaladdhassāpi sāhu dānaṁ;Api ca viceyya dānampi sāhu dānaṁ.
sn1.33:1.0.13: Viceyya dānaṁ sugatappasatthaṁ,Ye dakkhiṇeyyā idha jīvaloke;Etesu dinnāni mahapphalāni,Bījāni vuttāni yathā sukhette"ti.
sn1.33:1.0.14: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:
sn1.33:1.0.15: "Sādhu kho mārisa dānaṁ,Appakasmimpi sāhu dānaṁ;Saddhāyapi sāhu dānaṁ,Dhammaladdhassāpi sāhu dānaṁ;Viceyya dānampi sāhu dānaṁ,Api ca pāṇesupi sādhu saṁyamo.
sn1.33:1.0.16: Yo pāṇabhūtāni aheṭhayaṁ caraṁ,Parūpavādā na karonti pāpaṁ;Bhīruṁ pasaṁsanti na hi tattha sūraṁ,Bhayā hi santo na karonti pāpan"ti.
sn1.33:1.0.17: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "kassa nu kho, bhagavā, subhāsitan"ti?
sn1.33:1.0.18: "Sabbāsaṁ vo subhāsitaṁ pariyāyena, api ca mamapi suṇātha –
sn1.33:1.0.19: Saddhā hi dānaṁ bahudhā pasatthaṁ,Dānā ca kho dhammapadaṁva seyyo;Pubbe ca hi pubbatare ca santo,Nibbānamevajjhagamuṁ sapaññā"ti.
